sn37.32:1.1: "Bhikkhus, there are five situations that are difficult to obtain for a woman who has not done merit. What are the five?
sn37.32:1.2: "She may wish: ‘May I be born into a suitable family!’ This is the first situation that is difficult to obtain for a woman who has not done merit.
sn37.32:1.3: "She may wish: ‘Having been born into a suitable family, may I marry into a suitable family!’ This is the second situation … .
sn37.32:1.4: "She may wish: ‘Having been born into a suitable family and having married into a suitable family, may I dwell at home without a rival!’This is the third situation … .
sn37.32:1.5: "She may wish: ‘Having been born into a suitable family … dwelling at home without a rival, may I bear sons!’ This is the fourth situation … .sn.iv.250
sn37.32:1.6: "She may wish: ‘Having been born into a suitable family … having borne sons, may I abide with my husband under my control! ’ This is the fifth situation … .
sn37.32:2.1: "These are the five situations that are difficult to obtain for a woman who has not done merit.
sn37.32:2.2: "Bhikkhus, there are five situations that are easy to obtain for a woman who has done merit. What are the five?
sn37.32:2.3: "She may wish: ‘May I be born into a suitable family!’ This is the first situation … .
sn37.32:2.4: "She may wish: ‘Having been born into a suitable family … having borne sons, may I abide with my husband under my control! ’ This is the fifth situation … .
sn37.32:2.5: "These are the five situations that are easy to obtain for a woman who has done merit."
